646565b40e43b5aafda1c724.leadin: One character in this novel has a picture of Demeter of Cnidus hanging on his wall, and several chapters of this work describe the protagonist’s attempt to concentrate on his “cow.” For 10 points each:
646565b40e43b5aafda1c724.leadin_sanitized: One character in this novel has a picture of Demeter of Cnidus hanging on his wall, and several chapters of this work describe the protagonist's attempt to concentrate on his "cow." For 10 points each:
parts: Identify this novel, whose protagonist Rickie Eliot grows up without what he considers a mother, but is nurtured when he goes to Cambridge.

The protagonist of this other novel by the author of The Longest Journey begins a relationship with Clive Durham, but he ends up choosing Alec Scuddel the gamekeeper. It is a thinly veiled depiction of the author’s homosexuality.
The Longest Journey and Maurice are lesser known works of this author of Where Angels Fear to Tread.
